imprint.title: Impressum
imprint.subtitle: Angaben gemäß § 5 TMG
imprint.englishNotice: Legal notice (in German as required by German law)
imprint.contentLiabilityText: Als Diensteanbieter sind wir gemäß § 7 Abs.1 TMG für eigene Inhalte auf diesen Seiten nach den allgemeinen Gesetzen verantwortlich. Nach §§ 8 bis 10 TMG sind wir als Diensteanbieter jedoch nicht verpflichtet, übermittelte oder gespeicherte fremde Informationen zu überwachen oder nach Umständen zu forschen, die auf eine rechtswidrige Tätigkeit hinweisen.
imprint.linkLiabilityText: Unser Angebot enthält Links zu externen Websites Dritter, auf deren Inhalte wir keinen Einfluss haben. Deshalb können wir für diese fremden Inhalte auch keine Gewähr übernehmen. Für die Inhalte der verlinkten Seiten ist stets der jeweilige Anbieter oder Betreiber der Seiten verantwortlich.
imprint.disputeText: Die Europäische Kommission stellt eine Plattform zur Online-Streitbeilegung (OS) bereit. Wir sind nicht bereit oder verpflichtet, an Streitbeilegungsverfahren vor einer Verbraucherschlichtungsstelle teilzunehmen.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
privacy.section2Intro: We collect and process the following personal data:
privacy.section2Item1: Account data: Name, email address (via Google authentication)
privacy.section2Item2: Profile picture: Optionally uploaded photo, stored as a compressed base64 string
privacy.section2Item4: Health data (Art. 9 GDPR): Allergies and intolerances — these special categories of personal data are only collected and processed with your explicit consent
privacy.section2Item5: Preferences: Cuisine preferences, preferred course type for Running Dinner
privacy.section2Item6: Usage: Created dinners, participations, chat messages, swipe decisions, team registrations
privacy.section2Item7: Technical data: IP address, browser type, access time (via Firebase infrastructure)
privacy.section3Intro: Processing of your data takes place on the basis of the following legal grounds:
privacy.section3Item1: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (Consent): For processing health data (allergies), uploading a profile picture, and using non-essential functions
privacy.section3Item2: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (Contract performance): For providing platform functions (creating dinners, joining, chat)
privacy.section3Item3: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (Legitimate interest): For technical analysis and platform security
privacy.section3Item4: Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR: For processing special categories of personal data (allergies as health data) — only with explicit consent
privacy.section4Text1: We use Google Firebase (Google Ireland Limited / Google LLC) as infrastructure for authentication, database (Firestore), and hosting. Google acts as a processor pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.
privacy.section4Text2: Personal data is transferred to the USA. This transfer is safeguarded by the EU-US Data Privacy Framework (adequacy decision of the EU Commission of 10 July 2023). Google LLC is certified under the Data Privacy Framework.
privacy.section4Text3: In addition, the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) of the EU Commission serve as additional safeguards.
privacy.section5Text1: This website uses exclusively technically necessary cookies and local storage mechanisms (localStorage/IndexedDB) for Firebase authentication. These are required to keep you signed in after login. No marketing or tracking cookies are used.
privacy.section5Text2: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (necessary for providing the service) and § 25(2)(2) TDDDG (technically required storage).
privacy.section6Intro: Under the GDPR you have the following rights:
privacy.section6Item1: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You may request information about the personal data we have stored about you
privacy.section6Item2: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You may request the correction of incorrect data. You can do this directly via your profile page.
privacy.section6Item3: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You may request the deletion of your data. You can delete your account and all associated data yourself at any time via the profile page.
privacy.section6Item4: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You may request the restriction of processing of your data
privacy.section6Item5: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You may request that we provide you with your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format
privacy.section6Item6: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): You may object to the processing of your data insofar as it is based on legitimate interest
privacy.section6Item7: Right to withdraw consent (Art. 7(3) GDPR): You may withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.section6Item8: Right to lodge a complaint (Art. 77 GDPR): You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority
privacy.section7Text1: Your personal data is stored as long as your user account exists. When your account is deleted, all associated data (profile, photo, preferences, location) is immediately deleted.
privacy.section7Text2: Created dinner entries and chat messages may remain in anonymized form after account deletion, if required for the platform's function for other participants.
privacy.section8Title: 8. Google reCAPTCHA and Firebase App Check
privacy.section8Text1: To protect against abuse, automated access (bots) and spam, we use Firebase App Check together with Google reCAPTCHA v3. The provider is Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland (parent company: Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA).
privacy.section8Text2: reCAPTCHA analyses various characteristics of your behaviour on the website in the background (e.g. IP address, time spent on the site, mouse movements, browser and device information) and sets cookies for this purpose. The collected data is transmitted to Google and processed there. You are not specifically informed when an analysis takes place, other than through this privacy policy.
privacy.section8Text3: The legal basis for processing is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Our legitimate interest lies in protecting our web application from abuse and automated attacks and in ensuring the stability and security of our services.
privacy.section8Text4: A transfer of personal data to the USA cannot be ruled out. Google is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework, which ensures an adequate level of data protection.
privacy.section8Text5: For more information, please see the <0>Google Privacy Policy</0> and the <1>reCAPTCHA Terms of Service</1>.
privacy.section9Text: For questions about privacy or to exercise your rights, please contact:
